channel.title: BetLegend Picks Latest Content
channel.description: Latest BetLegend featured games, previews, picks, and news.

item.title: About BetLegendPicks | Transparent Sports Betting Analysis

item.title: Betting Run Line Versus Money Line in Major League Baseball | BetLegend Picks
item.description: A deep Major League Baseball betting backtest comparing underdog money line bets versus +1.5 run line bets across 2,223 model plays. See yearly ROI, price buckets, home and road splits, and why the money line beat the run line.

item.description: Soccer Friday May 8 2026. Bundesliga Round 33 Borussia Dortmund vs Eintracht Frankfurt 2:30 PM ET at Signal Iduna Park, Dortmund -200 over 1.5 at 1.11. La Liga Levante vs Osasuna 3:00 PM ET at Estadi Ciutat de Valencia with Levante chasing relegation survival and Osasuna chasing European qualification. Two pivotal European league fixtures, full preview.

item.title: NBA Playoff Preview: Knicks vs 76ers and Spurs vs Timberwolves for May 8, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: NBA Conference Semifinals Game 3 Friday May 8 2026. New York Knicks at Philadelphia 76ers 7 PM ET on Prime Video at Wells Fargo Center, PHI -1 with the moneyline at -112 and the total at 213.5, New York leads series 2-0. San Antonio Spurs at Minnesota Timberwolves 9:30 PM ET on Prime Video at Target Center, SAS -3.5 with the total at 215.5 and the moneyline at -175, series tied 1-1. Two East and West Game 3s, full preview and market snapshot.

item.title: NHL Analysis - May 08, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs Second Round Friday May 8 2026. Canadiens at Sabres Game 2 7 PM ET on TNT/truTV/Max at KeyBank Center, Buffalo -130 with the total at 5.5, Sabres lead 1-0. Golden Knights at Ducks Game 3 9:30 PM ET on TNT/truTV/Max at Honda Center, Vegas -111 series tied 1-1. Two pivotal Round 2 games, full preview and market snapshot.

item.title: MLB Analysis - May 08, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: MLB Friday May 8 2026 fifteen-game slate. Featured: Braves at Dodgers 10:10 PM ET at Dodger Stadium with Chris Sale facing Emmet Sheehan, ATL +105 LA -115 total 8. Yankees at Brewers 7:40 PM ET at American Family Field with Max Fried facing Jacob Misiorowski. Mets at Diamondbacks 9:40 PM ET at Chase Field. Full coverage of all 15 games on the schedule.

item.title: Knicks vs 76ers Game 3 Analysis - May 8, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: Knicks at 76ers Game 3 May 8 2026 at Wells Fargo Center. PHI -1, total 213.5, ML -112. New York carries a 2-0 lead into Philadelphia with OG Anunoby hamstring questionable and Joel Embiid hip and ankle questionable. 7 PM ET on Prime Video. Full preview.

item.title: MLB Analysis - May 07, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: MLB Thursday May 7 2026 marquee slate. Rangers at Yankees 12:35 PM ET with Gore vs Blackburn, NYY -194. Reds at Cubs 2:20 PM ET with Lowder vs Imanaga at Wrigley. Mets at Rockies 3:10 PM ET makeup game with Scott vs Quintana at Coors. Full preview, pitching matchups, and market snapshot.

item.title: NHL Analysis - May 07, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs Round 2 continues Thursday May 7 2026. Hurricanes at Flyers Game 3 at Wells Fargo Center 8:00 PM ET on TNT. Carolina leads the series 2-0 with the road moneyline favorite. Total 5.5 (over +120, under -148). Philadelphia hunts the Game 3 home win to flip series geometry. Full preview, advanced stats, and market snapshot.

item.title: NBA Analysis - May 07, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: NBA Conference Semifinals Game 2 Thursday May 7 2026. Cavaliers at Pistons 7 PM ET on Prime Video at Little Caesars Arena, Detroit -3.5 with the moneyline at -162. Lakers at Thunder 9:30 PM ET on Prime Video at Paycom Center, Oklahoma City -15.5 with the total at 209.5 and the moneyline at -900. Two East and West Game 2s, full preview and market snapshot.

item.title: MLB Preview: Wednesday Eleven-Game Board for May 6, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: MLB Wednesday May 6 2026 eleven-game slate. Dodgers at Astros 2:10 PM ET with Tyler Glasnow facing Lance McCullers, Los Angeles -220 with the total at 8.5. Brewers at Cardinals 1:15 PM ET, MIL -110 total 8.5. Yankees host Rangers 7:40 PM ET, Will Warren vs Nathan Eovaldi. Royals at Guardians 7:40 PM ET, Cole Ragans vs Joey Cantillo. Full preview, lines, advanced stats.

item.title: NBA Playoff Preview: 76ers vs Knicks and Timberwolves vs Spurs for May 6, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: NBA Conference Semifinals continue Wednesday May 6 2026 with two Game 2s. 76ers at Knicks 7 PM ET on ESPN at Madison Square Garden, New York -6.5 with the total at 215.5 and the moneyline at -270. Timberwolves at Spurs 9:30 PM ET on ESPN at Frost Bank Center, San Antonio -9.5 with the total at 215.5. Both home favorites trail 0-1 in their series. Full preview, lines, advanced stats.

item.title: NHL Playoff Preview: Canadiens vs Sabres and Ducks vs Golden Knights for May 6, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs second round Wednesday May 6 2026. Canadiens at Sabres Game 1 7 PM ET on TNT at KeyBank Center, Buffalo -130 with the total at 5.5. Ducks at Golden Knights Game 2 9:30 PM ET on TNT at T-Mobile Arena, Vegas -162. Vegas leads the series 1-0 after a 3-1 Game 1 win. Full preview, lines, advanced stats.

item.title: Athletics vs Phillies Pick: Oakland Moneyline at Citizens Bank Park | BetLegend
item.description: Athletics ML +156 vs Phillies free pick at Citizens Bank Park May 6 2026. Jeffrey Springs 3.96 ERA, Zack Wheeler 2.45 ERA, the dog price holds value as Oakland sits 1st in the AL West with a contact-and-gap road profile that travels. 2-unit BetLegend MLB pick.

item.description: MLB Tuesday slate May 5 2026 features 10-game schedule headlined by Jacob deGrom and the Texas Rangers at Yankee Stadium, Sandy Alcantara hosting Baltimore at LoanDepot Park, and Kevin Gausman bringing the Toronto rotation to Tampa Bay. Full pitcher matchups, advanced stats, and betting line analysis.

item.title: MLB Analysis - May 04, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: Twelve MLB games Monday May 4 2026. Yoshinobu Yamamoto on the bump for the Dodgers in Houston opposite Colton Gordon at Daikin Park, LAD -160 with the total at 9. Orioles at Yankees in the Bronx primetime window. Mets at Coors Field for the Rockies series opener. Red Sox at Comerica, Blue Jays at Tropicana, Phillies at loanDepot, Reds at Wrigley, Brewers at Busch, Braves at T-Mobile, Padres at Oracle. Full coast-to-coast rundown.

item.title: MLB Analysis - May 03, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: Fifteen MLB games Sunday May 3 2026. Justin Wrobleski for the Dodgers in St. Louis opposite Dustin May for the Cardinals. Trey Yesavage for the Blue Jays at Target Field opposite Joe Ryan. Jack Leiter on Sunday Night Baseball at Comerica Park. Astros at Fenway, Phillies in Miami, Braves at Coors Field, Mets in Anaheim. Full coast-to-coast rundown.

item.title: MLB Analysis - May 02, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: Fifteen MLB games Saturday May 2 2026. Roki Sasaki anchors Dodgers-Cardinals at Busch. Andrew Painter starts for the Phillies in Miami. Chris Sale opens at Coors Field for Atlanta. Nolan McLean takes the bump for the Mets in Anaheim. Dylan Cease, Spencer Arrighetti, Kumar Rocker headline the supporting slate. Full lines, probables, and storylines for every game.

item.title: MLB Analysis - May 01, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: MLB Friday May 1 2026 slate. Diamondbacks-Cubs at Wrigley with Gallen vs Rea. Dodgers visit the Cardinals at Busch Stadium with Sheehan vs Liberatore. Yankees host the Orioles at Yankee Stadium. Astros at Fenway with Crochet on the rise. Reds-Pirates NL Central. Confirmed games and verified probables across the slate.

item.description: Sabres/Bruins Over 5.5 free pick Game 6 at TD Garden. Buffalo leads the series 3-2 and a desperate elimination Bruins script projects over the total. 3-unit BetLegend NHL playoff pick.
